rationale: In the citing paper, Hauser et al. (2010) appears only once in a grouped literature citation about machine-learning approaches with complexity control for large-scale preference measurement. The citation is used as broad background context in the introduction/literature review, alongside other papers, and the text does not assign it a distinct role. The ASE method, design, estimation, and empirical tests are developed without directly borrowing, extending, or contesting the DOC framework from the cited paper.
